description: Wind Power LLC's new European customer Deutsche Windkraft GmbH (default currency EUR, exchange rate 1 EUR = 1.10 USD) has placed a large order. Process the complete sales cycle: a Sales Order for 100 Wind Turbines at €20 each, an €800 advance payment, a first partial delivery of 60 units with invoicing and advance allocation, followed by collection of the remaining balance on that invoice. The customer then returns 5 defective turbines from the first shipment — process the sales return and issue a credit note. Complete the order by delivering the remaining 40 units, invoicing them, and collecting the final net payment at a manually updated exchange rate of 1.12 USD/EUR. The customer’s total outstanding balance should be zero when finished. Log into ERPNext at http://localhost:8080 with credentials Administrator / admin.
